name: MLX Inference Flow
description: Single-turn chat using an MLX model: selects the MLX E2B model, types a prompt, generates, and verifies response.

steps.description: Select the MLX E2B model from the sidebar.
Wait for the MLX model to load (may take 10-30 seconds).
Type prompt in the input field.
steps.value: Write a short haiku about mountains.

steps.description: Tap 'Generate Response' to start text generation.
Verify that text generation produced results.
